hero.sub: Book online in under a minute. Pick your barber, your service, the time that fits. No calls, no waiting.

manifesto.opening: It all begins with something stronger than a business: brotherhood.
manifesto.p1: Years ago, a group of brothers and friends shared more than just a place — they shared a vision. Each with his own style, his own way of seeing life and the craft of barbering, but united by one passion: to create something that went beyond the haircut.
manifesto.quote: To build a place where image, attitude and personal identity all meet under one roof.
manifesto.p2: After walking different roads, learning in different settings, and growing both personally and professionally, they came back together to give that dream life in the heart of Orlando, FL.
manifesto.closing: More than technique, more than style: the union of brothers who set out to create a place where every person can express themselves, renew themselves, and project their best self.

local.title: A place built to linger.
local.lead: Pro tools, fresh coffee, and a chair with your name on it. The detail is in every corner.

services.title: What we do.
services.lead: A short, focused menu. Pick what you need and we'll handle the rest.

descriptions.hotTowelShave: Shave or beard styling with hot towel, steam, lather, beard oil, and a cold towel finish.
descriptions.mensHaircutShave: Classic or fade haircut with shave or beard styling — hot towel, steam, lather, beard oil, and a cold towel finish.
descriptions.noseEarWax: Hot wax hair removal for the nose and ears.
descriptions.experience: Includes haircut, hot towel shave, nose & ear wax, eyebrows, collagen mask, and a special drink.
